mapper.select:
SELECT mall_id , mall_cd , mall_nm , mall_info ->> 'mall_url' AS mall_url , mall_info ->> 'api_url' AS api_url , mall_info ->> 'delivery_type' AS delivery_type , mall_info ->> 'collection_type' AS collection_type , mall_info ->> 'sales_type_cd' AS sales_type_cd , is_active , TO_CHAR(created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS created_at , TO_CHAR(updated_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS updated_at , created_by , updated_by FROM om_mall_m
ORDER BY mall_cd LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}

where.if: AND (m.mall_cd ILIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR m.mall_nm ILIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR s.store_cd ILIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR s.store_nm ILIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%')

mapper.select:
SELECT s.store_id AS store_id , m.mall_cd AS mall_cd , m.mall_nm AS mall_nm , s.store_cd AS store_cd , s.store_nm AS store_nm , m.mall_info ->> 'delivery_type' AS delivery_type , m.mall_info ->> 'collection_type' AS collection_type , m.mall_info ->> 'sales_type_cd' AS sales_type_cd , s.is_active , s.store_info::text AS store_info , TO_CHAR(s.created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS created_at , s.created_by FROM om_mall_m m JOIN om_mall_store_m s ON m.mall_cd = s.mall_cd
ORDER BY m.mall_cd, s.store_cd LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM om_mall_m m JOIN om_mall_store_m s ON m.mall_cd = s.mall_cd
SELECT mall_cd AS mall_cd, mall_nm AS mall_nm FROM om_mall_m WHERE is_active = true ORDER BY mall_cd
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM om_mall_store_m WHERE mall_cd = #{mallCd} AND corporation_cd = #{corporationCd}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO om_mall_store_m (mall_cd, corporation_cd, store_cd, store_nm, store_info, is_active, created_by) VALUES (#{mallCd}, #{corporationCd}, #{storeCd}, #{storeNm}, #{storeInfoJson}::jsonb, #{isActive}, #{createdBy})
mapper.select: SELECT s.store_id AS storeId , m.mall_cd AS mallCd , m.mall_nm AS mallNm , s.store_cd AS storeCd , s.store_nm AS storeNm , m.mall_info ->> 'delivery_type' AS deliveryType , m.mall_info ->> 'collection_type' AS collectionType , m.mall_info ->> 'sales_type_cd' AS salesTypeCd , s.is_active AS isActive , s.store_info::text AS storeInfo , TO_CHAR(s.created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS createdAt , s.created_by AS createdBy FROM om_mall_m m JOIN om_mall_store_m s ON m.mall_cd = s.mall_cd WHERE s.corporation_cd = #{corporationCd} AND s.store_cd = #{storeCd} LIMIT 1
